reason: Cannot achieve gold=1 with behavioral tests. The gold patches for HttpParser.h and request-smuggling.test.ts fail to apply in this environment (base context differs from gold's expected context at line 870). My behavioral tests check for the actual fix (content-length duplicate detection via header iteration + value comparison), which is absent in the broken gold. The 8 tests that pass are for pr-comments config edits which patched successfully. 2 tests fail (httpparser_validates_content_length_behavior, request_smuggling_test_cases_are_present) because the code fix patches failed. Cannot remove these tests without reducing coverage of the core fix. Cannot make them pass on broken gold without making them tautologies (defeating the purpose of the rewrite).
